title: MonoX - REKT
relevance_summary: Price manipulation attack on a DEX using a bug in the swap contract

prevention.rule: Block any tx that updates token info for the same token in both tokenIn and tokenOut parameters.

red_flags: price of tokenOut overwriting the price of tokenIn
massive inflation of the price of the platform's native token
monitoring_rules: Block any tx that updates token info for the same token in both tokenIn and tokenOut parameters.
summary: MonoX, a DEX based on Single Token Liquidity pools, was hacked via a price manipulation bug in the swap contract. Hackers inflated the price of the platform's native token and cashed out over $30M worth of assets. A guard could have blocked such transactions by preventing the update of token info for the same token in both tokenIn and tokenOut parameters.
